summary: Rachel questions if Kim HaJin had foreseen and prepared for the ongoing collapse, referencing a butterfly monster. Amidst the chaos, Kim SuHo unexpectedly appears, causing Rachel to faint. The narrator, revealed as the author of the novel, reflects on their fictional world materializing around them, realizing they have become a character within their own story. The situation also highlights Hajin's 'fire attack' and a character's surprise at Nayoon's talent.
key_moments: Rachel questions Kim HaJin's foresight regarding a collapse and a butterfly monster.
Kim SuHo makes an unexpected appearance, leading to Rachel fainting.
The author realizes their created world has become real, and they are now a character within it.
Hajin's 'fire attack' is mentioned, alongside observations about Nayoon's talent.
